name: Can we still get high
short_description: Embark on an exciting journey with your friends or on your own! To reach the top, you'll have to solve challenging puzzles, overcome dangerous obstacles, and coordinate with each other. Laser communication is both a blessing and a challenge!
detailed_description:
Can we still get high is a dynamic platformer that takes you to an abandoned robot factory where every jump and decision counts. Embark on a journey through exciting levels full of dangers, traps and challenging puzzles.

Game features:

Addictive gameplay:

Use your reflexes to overcome challenging obstacles and puzzles.

Flexible approach:

The game is suitable for both those who like to play on their own and for groups of friends in multiplayer mode.

Unique abilities:

Each of the characters has its own abilities that you can use in the passage

Repeated passage:

After the first playthrough, you can replay the game as other characters

Immerse yourself in an unforgettable adventure and become a hero in the world of Can we still get high!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Polish*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Ukrainian*, Japanese*, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
